timeline.event2: We submit an application for an organization number to the Tax Authority (SKV8400)
timeline.event3: We have received our organization number from the Tax Authority
timeline.event4: The association has acquired a phone number

f1.title: Operating our own environment
f1.subtitle: We operate our own infrastructure, but without guarantee - everything happens on a best effort basis.

f2.title: Non-profit association
f2.subtitle: We are a non-profit association, run by enthusiasts and without profit interest.

f3.title: Open source
f3.subtitle: We promote open source and free software usage.

f4.title: System monitoring
f4.subtitle: We monitor our systems, but offer no uptime guarantees.

f5.title: Realize your IT hobby
f5.subtitle: Get access to resources at a low cost.

f6.title: Management via terminal
f6.subtitle: We manage our environment primarily through the terminal.

hero.title: Digital lab environment at a fixed membership price
hero.subtitle: We are run on a non-profit basis, delivering secure and sustainable solutions for non-profit associations and individuals.

systembar.not_opened: We have not officially opened yet!
